    applicationMain - package applicationMain
    The applicationMain package is used to hold the mainline classes for the application.
    attemptUpdateEmail(User, String) - Static method in class guiUserUpdate.ControllerUserUpdate
    Method: attemptUpdateEmail Validates and updates the user's email address.
    attemptUpdateName(User, String, String) - Static method in class guiUserUpdate.ControllerUserUpdate
    Method: attemptUpdateName Validates and updates First, Middle, Last, or Preferred Name.
    attemptUpdatePassword(User, String) - Static method in class guiUserUpdate.ControllerUserUpdate
    Method: attemptUpdatePassword Validates and updates the user's password.
